chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1163 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 13-09-2023 Mr. Asif Aman, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner has filed this petition for causing mutation and Foti Khata Badal of his late father in favour of petitioner and other legal heirs. When confronted to the question of maintainability of this petition, he submits that petitioner has already filed an application (Annex-D, page-29) to the Commissioner, Sukkur on 24.01.2022 for the purpose, but he is not deciding the same. This petition is disposed of with the consent of learned AAG in the terms whereby petitioner shall file a fresh application to the Mukhtiarkar and Assistant Commissioner, concerned, who shall decide the same within a period of 15-days and thereafter submit report. Let copy of this order be provided to the office of learned AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
